message:
test(proptest): add 22 property tests for crypto_shim and extension_replay modules (bd-3ar8v.9)

11 proptests for crypto_shim: hex_lower roundtrip, output length, lowercase
chars, odd-length decode, encode_output hex/unknown-fallback, random_bytes
length, SHA-256 output size/determinism, timing-safe reflexive/bit-flip.

11 proptests for extension_replay: compute_overhead_per_mille
(zero-when-leq, zero-baseline-max, non-negative), builder contiguous
sequences/deterministic ordering, identical-bundle no divergence, JSON
roundtrip, capture gate disabled-always-rejects/deterministic,
canonical_rank all-distinct, events sorted by logical clock.

Total lib tests: 4814 (up from 4792).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
